author: sdking
description: Rich tables with merges, styles, and choice columns, wikilinks inside fenced code blocks. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: sdking.xing
manifest.description: Interactive tables with merges, typed columns, styles, and wikilinks inside fenced code blocks.
manifest.name: Rich Table

name: Rich Table

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🚀 New features
- table format versioning infrastructure
- split-range-style op; single cell edit within range rule splits range
- add bold/italic controls to style panel; include in clear format
- auto-fit-all button at top-left corner; fix autoFitRowHeight with rowspan
- per-table lock toggle at col-selector / add-col corner
- move drag handles to selector strip outer edges; fix col drop indicator
- add setting to allow/disallow editing in reading view (default: off)
- row filtering; fix auto-fit col width measurement; fix row-resize scroll jump
- row filtering; fix auto-fit col width; filter icon contrast

## 🐛 Bug fixes
- typed-cell bold/italic hidden; range style clears correctly; rowHeights sparse
- clear/apply style on merged data cells uses range target
- autoFitColWidth natural width; unify corner button sizes to SEL_CELL
- resize handle height/width updated to 32px to match expanded selectors
- correct selector strip positions, prevent edge-add drift and auto-fit col growth

## ♻️ Refactor
- extract selector strip layout constants to selectorLayout.ts
- position:absolute overlays inside bt-render-root; eliminate viewport math

## 📝 Documentation
- update readme for column filtering bump to 0.1.10
- update README and template for drag grip and reading-view setting
- update README and template for filtering, selector-strip resize, and auto-fit

**Full changelog**: https://github.com/SdKay/obsidian-rich-table/compare/0.1.9...0.1.10

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🚀 New features
- selector-strip resize handles; proximity hover; merge-aware row resize
- double-click resize seam to auto-fit column width / row height

## 🐛 Bug fixes
- stop selector selection changing after pointerup
- selector strips show one cell per physical col/row, independent of merges
- pin table width during resize, follow selectors, narrow hidden-col indicator
- close active panel before opening a new one; fix Escape key on unfocused panel

## 📝 Documentation
- merge Features and Planned into unified roadmap table; update template gif

**Full changelog**: https://github.com/SdKay/obsidian-rich-table/compare/0.1.8...0.1.9

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🚀 New features
- highlight selected rows/cols in table during selector strip drag
- Excel-style row/col selector strips with A:B column-range notation
- add A:B column-range notation and semantic row/col style buttons

## 🐛 Bug fixes
- keep selection highlight while panel open; prevent panel stacking

## 📝 Documentation
- update README, template, and skill for row/col selector strips and A:B notation
- add YAML quoting rule for column names with special characters
- restore planned features section (user-facing roadmap)
- restore Claude Code skill section (user-facing feature)
- clean up repo — remove unused design assets, rewrite README for readability

**Full changelog**: https://github.com/SdKay/obsidian-rich-table/compare/0.1.7...0.1.8
